issue_title: Incorrect handling of self-closing tags noframes, style and title cause remainder of document to be html-escaped
issue_description:
Given the input: </head> <body> <p>Whatever</p> </body> </html> With instead of <style/>, the result is different but still wrong (http://try.jsoup.org/~BZ3uoMki-r904fZxUOWJgLJO7r8 ): <html> <head> <title> </head>

Whatever

That weirdness was fixed for

Whatever

Looking at the source, it seems only the HtmlTreeBuilderState handling for , <style> and <title> in the methods handleRawText and handleRcData doesn't get along with the self-closing tags. Any other tagname I've checked (and I tried to cover all branches of that case StartTag switch) results in a good parse similar to the <script> case, which is what I'd expect. Thanks for looking into this!
